seo.title: Atelier Pricing — $99/Year for Unlimited AI Website Building
seo.description: Build up to 10 professional websites for just $99/year. Atelier's AI-powered builder lets you create, edit, and publish from your iPhone — no Wix or WordPress complexity needed.
seo.ogTitle: Atelier Pricing: $99/Year — Build Up to 10 AI-Powered Websites
seo.ogDescription: Unlimited AI website creation for $99/year. Edit anywhere from your iPhone, manage up to 10 sites, and skip the complexity of traditional builders.

hero.tagline: Everything you need to build, edit, and publish stunning websites — for less than the cost of a single dinner out per year.

heroImage.alt: Atelier pricing — build beautiful AI websites from your iPhone

items.title: Edit Anytime, Anywhere — Right from Your iPhone
items.desc: Your website studio lives in your pocket. Update text, swap images, rearrange sections, and publish changes on the go — from the train, the café, or your couch at midnight. No laptop required, ever.

items.title: 100% AI-Powered — No Drag-and-Drop Headaches
items.desc: Traditional builders like Wix and WordPress force you through clunky editors, endless templates, and plugin nightmares. Atelier skips all of that. Describe what you want in plain language and AI builds it — beautifully, instantly, and optimized for search engines out of the box.

items.title: Up to 10 Websites Under One Plan
items.desc: Run a salon and a personal blog? A restaurant and a booking page? With Atelier, you can create and manage up to 10 completely independent websites — all from a single $99/year subscription.

seoSection.p: With Wix or WordPress, getting your site to rank on Google means wrestling with SEO plugins, meta tag editors, sitemap generators, and technical configurations most people never finish. Atelier handles it all automatically — clean HTML structure, optimized metadata, fast loading, and mobile-first design that search engines love. Your site is born ready to rank.
items: Clean, semantic HTML for search engine crawlers
Mobile-first design — a key Google ranking factor
Lightning-fast load times with no bloated plugins
No SEO plugins or manual configuration needed

cta.p: Download Atelier and launch your first website today.
